Author: DriftlessDigits
Name: Scrooge
Punchline: A gil saved is a gil earned.
Description: "You might say that everythin's for sale here in Ul'dah — as long as you've got the gil." — Momodi Modi
Changelog: Pricing trust patch. Fixed: your own listings are never skipped as price outliers - if you priced it, it anchors the undercut (no more repricing against a troll's 900k wall). New: when the market is completely silent, pinch falls back to your own sale history (staleness-gated, clearly labeled in chat - never silent). New: sharp upward reprices of an existing listing now hold the current price and flag for review instead of auto-applying; flags persist across sessions in the Triage window's Held Flags section (dismiss or act on them anytime). New Outlier config: upward-hold toggle and sensitivity multiplier. New Hawk listings ride the market price but warn when it dwarfs your own sale history.
